INTM 439 — Spring 2026

Ye Ole
Pop Topper

5-axis CNC machined aluminum bottle opener — design-to-delivery with FEA, custom soft jaw fixtures, and production cost analysis.

ENGINEER
Kacper Walczuk
MACHINE
DMG MORI DMU-50
MATERIAL
6061-T6 Aluminum
OPS
3 (5-Axis)
Interactive

3D Model Viewer

Three.js approximation of the bottle opener. Drag to orbit, scroll to zoom.

YeOlePopTopper — Three.jsdrag to rotate
01 — Specs

Part Specifications

LENGTH
2.563"
WIDTH
0.953"
THICKNESS
0.460"
MATERIAL
6061-T6
HOLE
ø0.213" Thru
CHAMFERS
1/64" × 45°
TOLERANCE
±0.005"
FINISH
Raw Machined
02 — Design

CAD Model

PHASE 01

SolidWorks 2024

Spline-based profile with fully defined sketch. Vector reference from customer overlaid. Chamfers added to all edges and thru hole. Blueprint exported as PDF and DXF.

Spline ProfilesFully DefinedEdge Chamfers
03 — Analysis

Finite Element Analysis

Three materials tested under 50 lbf: PLA (failed), A356 cast (passed), 6061-T6 (selected).

FEA STUDY

Static Stress — 6061-T6

Peak stress 138 MPa vs 275 MPa yield. PLA exceeded 50 MPa yield — would fail. Handle is the critical feature. Factor of safety validated for production.

Von Mises50 lbf3 Materials
04 — Workholding

Custom Soft Jaws

FIXTURE DESIGN

Soft Jaw Design

Custom jaws for SCHUNK KSC 11 base. Profile from part geometry with chamfered clamping edges. One-time setup for repeatable high-volume production.

SCHUNK KSC 11RepeatableProduction Ready
ON MACHINE

Installed on DMU-50

Machined soft jaws mounted with bottle opener seated. Part centered and clamped on two additional contact surfaces from jaw profile.

DMG MORI DMU-505-Axis Mill
05 — CAM

Mastercam Toolpaths

OP1

First Operation

3" face mill, 5/16" dynamic contour (828K toolpath), 1/4" finish contour, through hole drill, chamfers, and 5-axis engraving.

Dynamic MillHigh Speed5-Axis Engrave
OP2

Second Operation

3in face mill, 45 degree chamfer

5-AXIS

CNC Engraving

Name engraved on side face using 5-axis simultaneous milling. Machine tilts part to access side while maintaining tool engagement.

5-Axis Simultaneous
06 — Cost

Production Quoting

QUOTES

Bid Analysis

Stock: $1.64/block (Grainger). 1.62 parts/hr at $75/hr. 100 pcs: $4,407 (1–2 wk). 200 pcs: $8,238 (2–3 wk). Includes CAD/CAM, material, machining.

$1.64/block$75/hr4 Suppliers

02 — Inspection

Measurement

PHASE 01

Dimensional Inspection

Measured with digital calipers, height gauge, radius gauge set, pin gauges. Each feature measured at least twice.

CalipersHeight GaugePin Gauges
03 — CAD

Model & Drawing

PHASE 02A

3D Model

SolidWorks 2024. Extruded base, island profile with fillets. Four holes via Hole Wizard.

SolidWorksHole Wizard

Technical Drawing

Section A-A, Detail A, feature table, GD&T datums, revisions table.

Section ViewsGD&T

G01 Z-0.01 F12.0  ( Face )

M5  G91 G28 Z0 M9  M30
05 — CAM

MasterCam 2025

PHASE 03

Contouring & Drilling

5/8" end mill contours, 3/8" slot mill, 4 drills, chamfer mill. 14 total toolpaths with roughing and finishing passes.

Climb Milling14 Toolpaths8 Tools
RESULT

Final Part

Simulation verified all features match inspection. All edges broken with 0.015"×45° chamfers.

VerifiedSimulated

PERSONAL PROJECT — 2023–2025

MeetPad:
Video Conferencing Keypad

Designed and sold custom macro keypads for video conferencing. Full product lifecycle: concept, CAD, PCB design, firmware, SLA-printed enclosures, and direct-to-consumer sales.

ENGINEER
Kacper Walczuk
ROLE
Solo Founder & Designer
DURATION
2 Years
REVENUE
$10,000+
01 — Overview

Product Specifications

KEYS
4 Mechanical
KNOB
Volume Control
LEDS
2 Status Indicators
CONNECTION
USB & Bluetooth
ENCLOSURE
SLA Resin Print
PCB
Custom Designed
KEYCAPS
Custom Legends
COMPAT
Win / Mac / Linux
02 — Product

Industrial Design

DESIGN

Enclosure & Keycaps

Custom-designed enclosures printed on SLA resin printers for a smooth, professional finish. Interchangeable keycaps with custom-printed icons for mute, camera, end call, and share screen functions.

SLA PrintingResinCustom Keycaps
03 — Electronics

PCB & Firmware

ELECTRONICS

Custom PCB Design

Purpose-built PCB with microcontroller, mechanical key switches, rotary encoder for volume control, and dual LED indicators for mic and camera status. Plug-and-play functionality with no drivers required.

PCB DesignFirmwareHID Protocol
04 — Features

Functionality

FEATURES

Macro Keypad System

Four interchangeable macro buttons, a precision volume knob, and LED status indicators. Compatible with Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Google Meet, and other conferencing platforms. USB and Bluetooth connectivity.

ZoomTeamsUSBBluetooth
PACKAGE

Complete Kit

Each unit shipped with the keypad, spare blank keycaps for customization, USB-C cable, and quick-start guide. Designed for plug-and-play setup on Windows, Mac, and Linux.

USB-CCross-PlatformPlug & Play
05 — Brand

Marketing & Sales

RESULT

KeysCo Brand

Sold under the KeysCo brand at KeysCo.shop. Generated over $10,000 in revenue through direct-to-consumer sales. Product photography, marketing materials, and web presence all created in-house.

E-CommerceBranding$10K+ Revenue
06 — Software

Keys Studio

Created custom python based software allowing for additional customization of keypad functions. Global video and microphone mute allows for system wide control.

Software, Python
